name: summary field present
why_gate: the sidebar renders this field; without it the feature shipped nothing

name: customer_request field present
why_gate: agents triage on this field; a missing ask is a broken contract with the UI

name: summary fits the panel
why_gate: the sidebar truncates at 600 chars; a 601-char summary displays cut off

name: no resolution commitments
why_gate: one implied promise creates customer-facing liability no summary quality buys back

name: no fabricated claims
why_gate: an agent acting on one invented refund amount damages a real customer; slightly fabricated is fabricated
check: Every factual claim in the summary (order numbers, dates, amounts, prior interactions) appears in the ticket thread. PASS only if no unsupported claim exists.
